name: Putian Communication Group Limited
summary: Putian Communication Group Limited, an investment holding company, produces and sells optical fiber cables, communication copper cables, and structured cabling system products under the Hanphy brand name in Mainland China. The company offers its optical fiber cables and communication copper cables to telecommunications network operators for network construction and maintenance applications. Its structured cabling system products include optical and copper jumper wires; and connection and distribution components, such as distribution frames, wiring closets, and data and audio modules and faceplates used in buildings for the information transmission. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Nanchang, the People's Republic of China.
